name: CMP_MKT_SURVEY_BATCH_VL
query: SELECT B.BATCH_ID, B.VENDOR_ID, B.VENDOR_SURVEY_ID, T.BATCH_NAME, B.DATA_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, B.DATA_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, B.STATUS, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_SURVEY_BATCH_B B, CMP_MKT_SURVEY_BATCH_TL T WHERE B.BATCH_ID = T.BATCH_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
